---
title: "\'Early Scandinavian History\' (By the authors of \'Early Egyptian History\')"
---

## \'Early Scandinavian History\' (By the authors of \'Early Egyptian History\')

**Author:** Anna Maria Keary
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (February 1865-September 1866)

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
